result.finding: Layered Monolith with MVC pattern — single Spring Boot application with clear separation into Controller, Service, Repository, and Model layers, using Thymeleaf for server-side rendering.
evidence: Single deployable JAR, single docker-compose app service
Clear package structure: controller/, service/, repository/, model/, util/
Spring MVC @Controller classes with Thymeleaf templates (Views layer)
No service discovery, API gateway, or message broker patterns found
No Eureka, Zuul, Kafka, or RabbitMQ dependencies in pom.xml
